{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary to the General Manager",
  "description": "LVTOPSUN (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) is a professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion energy storage batteries and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary to the General Manager

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
Core Administrative and Executive Support:


	Managing a complex calendar, scheduling meetings, appointments, and proactively resolving conflicts.
	Screening calls, emails, and general requests, responding to or redirecting them as appropriate, and drafting high-level correspondence, memos
	Preparing high-level correspondence, presentations, and reports.
	Cross-Departmental Coordination: Synchronizing activities between sales, engineering, and installation teams to ensure smooth workflow.
	Meeting Management: Organizing and coordinating meetings, preparing agendas and board packs, taking detailed minutes, and following up on action items to ensure timely execution of decisions.
	Information and Records Management: Developing and maintaining efficient filing systems for both physical and digital confidential records and executive documentation.
	Supporting the GMwith research, documentation, and tracking the progress of specific projects or strategic initiatives.


Corporate Governance and Compliance :


	Overseeing the timely and accurate submission of statutory returns and notifications to the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) and other sector-specific bodies (e.g., related to renewable energy standards or quality control for inverters/batteries).
	Serving as a formal link between the board, shareholders, internal management, and external regulatory bodies, ensuring transparency and effective communication.
	Preparing, approving (when authorized), signing, and sealing agreements, legal forms, and other official documents.
	Understanding and monitoring regulatory changes related to the Nigerian renewable energy sector.
	Managing documentation related to technical projects, site visits, or specific product certifications (solar panels, inverter batteries).
	Collaborating with various departments (e.g., IT, legal, finance, engineering) on administrative processes and project coordination within the energy value chain.


Qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND qualification in Business Administration, Office Management, Secretarial Studies, or a related field.
	Experience: 3 - 6 years of work experience
	Professional certification an added advantage.
	Preferably female, residing around Okota, Amuwo Odofin and Festac axis.
	Candidates residing aroundAgo, Amuwo Odofin, Festac and its environs would be given priority.


Skills:


	Excellent typing speed and transcription accuracy.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, and digital collaboration tools.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	High level of discretion, attention to detail, and professionalism.


Method of Application&nbsp;
&nbsp;Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: voxaby2@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates residing around Ago, Amuwo Odofin, Festac and its environs would be given priority.&nbsp;",

Secretary to the General Manager Job at Lvtopsun New Energy Company Limited




        
    

        
        LVTOPSUN (Guangdong LVTOPSUN New Energy Co., Ltd.) is a professional Chinese manufacturer specializing in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion energy storage batteries and systems, particularly for home and commercial use, offering solutions like LiFePO4 batteries, battery packs, and energy storage containers. Established in 2008, they focus on high-quality, safe, long-lasting products for solar energy integration, with business in over 50 countries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary to the General Manager

Job Location: Amuwo Odofin, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Responsibilities
Core Administrative and Executive Support:


	Managing a complex calendar, scheduling meetings, appointments, and proactively resolving conflicts.
	Screening calls, emails, and general requests, responding to or redirecting them as appropriate, and drafting high-level correspondence, memos
	Preparing high-level correspondence, presentations, and reports.
	Cross-Departmental Coordination: Synchronizing activities between sales, engineering, and installation teams to ensure smooth workflow.
	Meeting Management: Organizing and coordinating meetings, preparing agendas and board packs, taking detailed minutes, and following up on action items to ensure timely execution of decisions.
	Information and Records Management: Developing and maintaining efficient filing systems for both physical and digital confidential records and executive documentation.
	Supporting the GMwith research, documentation, and tracking the progress of specific projects or strategic initiatives.


Corporate Governance and Compliance :


	Overseeing the timely and accurate submission of statutory returns and notifications to the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) and other sector-specific bodies (e.g., related to renewable energy standards or quality control for inverters/batteries).
	Serving as a formal link between the board, shareholders, internal management, and external regulatory bodies, ensuring transparency and effective communication.
	Preparing, approving (when authorized), signing, and sealing agreements, legal forms, and other official documents.
	Understanding and monitoring regulatory changes related to the Nigerian renewable energy sector.
	Managing documentation related to technical projects, site visits, or specific product certifications (solar panels, inverter batteries).
	Collaborating with various departments (e.g., IT, legal, finance, engineering) on administrative processes and project coordination within the energy value chain.


Qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND qualification in Business Administration, Office Management, Secretarial Studies, or a related field.
	Experience: 3 - 6 years of work experience
	Professional certification an added advantage.
	Preferably female, residing around Okota, Amuwo Odofin and Festac axis.
	Candidates residing aroundAgo, Amuwo Odofin, Festac and its environs would be given priority.


Skills:


	Excellent typing speed and transcription accuracy.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, and digital collaboration tools.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	High level of discretion, attention to detail, and professionalism.


Method of Application 
 Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates residing around Ago, Amuwo Odofin, Festac and its environs would be given priority.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Public Relations Manager (PR Manager)",
  "description": "Elite Logistics &amp; Development Services Limited is an indigenous company with its operating office in Lagos and duly registered under the companies and allied matters ACT 1990 with RC1195367. ELADS Limited prides itself in meeting modern-day civil engineering, construction and general contracts administration challenges and ensuring timely, successful completion of projects.

Elite Logistics &amp; Development Services Limited strives to conduct its business fairly and honestly with consideration to the long-term needs of all its stakeholders. Competitive tendering, professional management, quality construction, an excellent safety record, a proven ability, cooperative and proactive approach have ensured our delivery of highest quality workman Poship and client satisfaction in both the public and private sectonrs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Relations Manager (PR Manager)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are seeking a Public Relations Manager (PR Manager) to nurture a strong industry network, increase awareness and develop an enviable corporate image by developing and executing effective communication and media relations programs.


Responsibilities


	Develop a marketing communications plan including strategy, goals, budget and tactics
	Develop media relations strategy, seeking high-level placements in print, broadcast and online media
	Coordinate all public relations activities
	Direct social media team to engage audiences across traditional and new media
	Leverage existing media relationships and cultivate new contacts within business and industry media
	Manage media inquiries and interview requests
	Create content for press releases, byline articles and keynote presentations
	Monitor, analyze and communicate PR results on a quarterly basis
	Evaluate opportunities for partnerships, sponsorships and advertising on an on-going basis.
	Build relationships with thought leaders to grow industry awareness
	Maintain a keen understanding of industry trends affecting clients and make appropriate recommendations regarding communication strategy surrounding them.


Requirements and skills


	BA / MA Degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications or a related discipline
	Proven working experience in public relations required
	Proven track record designing and executing successful public relations campaigns at both a local and national level
	Strong relationships with both local and national business and industry media outlets
	Experience in acting as a company spokesperson; comfortable and skilled in both broadcast and print media interviews
	Exceptional writing and editing skills
	Solid experience with social media including blogs, Facebook, Twitter, etc.
	Event planning experience.


Salary
N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: elitelogisticdevelopment@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Public Relations Manager (PR Manager) Job at Elite Logistics & Development Services Limited




        
    

        
        Elite Logistics & Development Services Limited is an indigenous company with its operating office in Lagos and duly registered under the companies and allied matters ACT 1990 with RC1195367. ELADS Limited prides itself in meeting modern-day civil engineering, construction and general contracts administration challenges and ensuring timely, successful completion of projects.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Elite Logistics & Development Services Limited strives to conduct its business fairly and honestly with consideration to the long-term needs of all its stakeholders. Competitive tendering, professional management, quality construction, an excellent safety record, a proven ability, cooperative and proactive approach have ensured our delivery of highest quality workman Poship and client satisfaction in both the public and private sectonrs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Relations Manager (PR Manager)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are seeking a Public Relations Manager (PR Manager) to nurture a strong industry network, increase awareness and develop an enviable corporate image by developing and executing effective communication and media relations programs.


Responsibilities


	Develop a marketing communications plan including strategy, goals, budget and tactics
	Develop media relations strategy, seeking high-level placements in print, broadcast and online media
	Coordinate all public relations activities
	Direct social media team to engage audiences across traditional and new media
	Leverage existing media relationships and cultivate new contacts within business and industry media
	Manage media inquiries and interview requests
	Create content for press releases, byline articles and keynote presentations
	Monitor, analyze and communicate PR results on a quarterly basis
	Evaluate opportunities for partnerships, sponsorships and advertising on an on-going basis.
	Build relationships with thought leaders to grow industry awareness
	Maintain a keen understanding of industry trends affecting clients and make appropriate recommendations regarding communication strategy surrounding them.


Requirements and skills


	BA / MA Degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications or a related discipline
	Proven working experience in public relations required
	Proven track record designing and executing successful public relations campaigns at both a local and national level
	Strong relationships with both local and national business and industry media outlets
	Experience in acting as a company spokesperson; comfortable and skilled in both broadcast and print media interviews
	Exceptional writing and editing skills
	Solid experience with social media including blogs, Facebook, Twitter, etc.
	Event planning experience.


Salary
N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Execution Engineer (Unix & Database)",
  "description": "BlueChip Technologies is a leading business application firm focused exclusively on assisting organizations in planning, designing, implementing and operating business application solutions and strategies that are central to creating and maintaining a competitive business advantage.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Execution Engineer (Unix &amp; Database)

Job Location: Lagos

Description


	As part of our continuous transformation, we are seeking Project Execution Engineer (Unix &amp; Database) to join our team.
	This role is ideal for a hands-on engineer with strong expertise in UNIX/Linux systems and enterprise database management, who is passionate about performance, reliability, and operational excellence in mission-critical environments.


Key Responsibilities


	Administer, configure and support UNIX/Linux server environments across production and project platforms.
	Manage and maintain enterprise databases, ensuring optimal performance, availability, and security.
	Perform database installation, configuration, patching, upgrades, and routine maintenance.
	Monitor system and database performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement tuning and optimization strategies.
	Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues across UNIX systems and database platforms.
	Implement and maintain high availability, replication, and disaster recovery solutions for supported databases.
	Ensure databases and systems comply with internal policies, security standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Support application teams with database provisioning, query optimization, and performance tuning.
	Automate routine system and database tasks using scripting (e.g., Shell, Python).
	Maintain system and database health checks, logs, and proactive monitoring to ensure uptime and reliability.
	Execute incident response, root cause analysis, and corrective actions for system or database failures.
	Develop and maintain technical documentation, standard operating procedures, and system configurations.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support deployments, migrations, and system improvements.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience in UNIX/Linux system administration and database engineering.
	Strong expertise in UNIX/Linux environments (e.g., AIX, Solaris, or Linux distributions).
	Proven experience managing at least two enterprise databases (e.g., Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL).
	Solid understanding of database architecture, performance tuning, backup/recovery, and high availability setups.
	Experience with scripting and automation tools (Shell, Python, etc.).
	Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills with the ability to resolve complex technical issues.
	Good understanding of system security, access control, and compliance practices.
	Excellent documentation, communication, and stakeholder engagement skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, enterprise environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@bluechiptech.biz using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-23",

  },

Project Execution Engineer (Unix & Database) Job at BlueChip Technologies




        
    

        
        BlueChip Technologies is a leading business application firm focused exclusively on assisting organizations in planning, designing, implementing and operating business application solutions and strategies that are central to creating and maintaining a competitive business advantage.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Execution Engineer (Unix & Database)

Job Location: Lagos

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As part of our continuous transformation, we are seeking Project Execution Engineer (Unix & Database) to join our team.
	This role is ideal for a hands-on engineer with strong expertise in UNIX/Linux systems and enterprise database management, who is passionate about performance, reliability, and operational excellence in mission-critical environments.


Key Responsibilities


	Administer, configure and support UNIX/Linux server environments across production and project platforms.
	Manage and maintain enterprise databases, ensuring optimal performance, availability, and security.
	Perform database installation, configuration, patching, upgrades, and routine maintenance.
	Monitor system and database performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement tuning and optimization strategies.
	Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues across UNIX systems and database platforms.
	Implement and maintain high availability, replication, and disaster recovery solutions for supported databases.
	Ensure databases and systems comply with internal policies, security standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Support application teams with database provisioning, query optimization, and performance tuning.
	Automate routine system and database tasks using scripting (e.g., Shell, Python).
	Maintain system and database health checks, logs, and proactive monitoring to ensure uptime and reliability.
	Execute incident response, root cause analysis, and corrective actions for system or database failures.
	Develop and maintain technical documentation, standard operating procedures, and system configurations.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support deployments, migrations, and system improvements.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience in UNIX/Linux system administration and database engineering.
	Strong expertise in UNIX/Linux environments (e.g., AIX, Solaris, or Linux distributions).
	Proven experience managing at least two enterprise databases (e.g., Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL).
	Solid understanding of database architecture, performance tuning, backup/recovery, and high availability setups.
	Experience with scripting and automation tools (Shell, Python, etc.).
	Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills with the ability to resolve complex technical issues.
	Good understanding of system security, access control, and compliance practices.
	Excellent documentation, communication, and stakeholder engagement skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, enterprise environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Property Accountant",
  "description": "Fadac Resources and Services Limited - We provide businesses with human capital solutions that can help improve oral performance while reducing employment practice risk. We can assist organizations, no matter how large or small, to establish, outsource, and troubleshoot any human resources functions/ challenges. Our belief is that people are the greatest asset in the organization, regardless of the business size, industry, and market share. We provide the best professionals backed with solid years of experience and knowledge, and their job is to integrate solutions for your business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Property Accountant

Job Location: Oregun, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	The Accounts &amp; Tax Manager is responsible for ensuring accurate accounting records, timely management reporting, and full tax compliance across JHP/MRDS operations.
	The role ensures all financial transactions are properly captured, reviewed, and reported in line with accounting standards and regulatory requirements while maintaining strong internal controls and supporting management decision-making.


Key Responsibilities
Accounts Responsibilities:


	Ensure all JHP/MRDS operational transactions are properly documented, raised, and accurately captured in the accounting system.
	Conduct regular reviews of all accounts to confirm accuracy, completeness, and consistency with supporting schedules and reconciliations.
	Prepare and manage monthly management accounts, financial schedules, commentaries, Board reports, audited financial statements, and statutory reports.
	Coordinate the preparation, review, and revision of annual budgets and forecasts in line with operational performance.
	Review and approve financial transactions to ensure accuracy and compliance with internal policies and controls.
	Oversee timely processing and review of daily payments and financial postings.
	Provide on-the-job training, coaching, and supervision of accounting staff to improve competence and efficiency.
	Perform any other duties as may be assigned by management.


Tax Responsibilities:


	Compute all applicable taxes including PAYE, WHT, VAT, CIT, CGT, DT, ITF, capital allowances, and related accruals in line with statutory requirements.
	Ensure timely filing and payment of all tax obligations to relevant authorities to avoid penalties and compliance breaches.
	Manage tax audits, queries, and engagements with tax authorities to resolve issues effectively.
	Review tax ledger accounts regularly to ensure accuracy and proper reconciliation.
	Maintain proper documentation of tax records, correspondences, and CAPEX invoices for audit and regulatory purposes.
	Ensure timely processing of tax clearance certificates and related documentation.
	Prepare and file transfer pricing documentation in compliance with applicable regulations.
	Stay updated on changes in tax laws and ensure continuous compliance across operations.
	Train and guide finance staff on tax processes, compliance, and reporting standards.
	Perform any other tax-related duties as may be assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related disciplines
	3 - 5 years of relevant experience in accounting and taxation within a structured corporate environment.
	ICAN certification is mandatory.
	Strong knowledge of IFRS, financial reporting standards, and Nigerian tax laws.
	Experience in management accounting, budgeting, forecasting, and tax compliance.
	Strong analytical, leadership, and reporting skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting/ERP systems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
